articles.title: Virat Kohli set for India return? Star batter eyes England ODI comeback after injury layoff
articles.description: Virat Kohli is edging closer to an international comeback, with reports suggesting he could return for the upcoming ODI series against England. The star batter is recovering well from a hamstring injury and is expected to undergo final fitness clearance soon.

articles.description: Zerodha’s CEO Nithin Kamath made headlines when he honored employee Rohit Agarwala with a generous reward of ₹2.5 lakh for achieving the impressive feat of losing 30 kg through a fitness wager. Once battling weight issues, Agarwala acknowledges the company's dedication to promoting health and wellness, which propelled him to success.

articles.title: Why are Cristiano Ronaldo fans attacking Bruno Fernandes on his Instagram comment section?

This unique skill set, coupled with his explosive batting, earned him blockbuster contracts in the Madhya Pradesh League (MPLT20) and then with the Sunrisers Hyderabad in the IPL.

articles.title: Iran to protest to FIFA after US denies early World Cup travel
articles.description: Iran's Football Federation will protest to FIFA after the US denied their request for an early trip to Los Angeles for their World Cup match against Belgium. The team, currently based in Tijuana, Mexico, will take the matter up through official channels.

Despite significant family sacrifices, his dream of representing India fuels him. Supported by his wife and inspired by his children, Manpreet credits teammates and seniors for his journey, which includes a historic Olympic bronze medal and a continued hunger for more success.

articles.title: Stafanie Taylor's late blitz saves West Indies from Scotland scare at Women's T20 World Cup
articles.description: West Indies Women secured a tense seven-run victory over Scotland Women in the ICC Women's T20 World Cup. Stafanie Taylor's explosive 47* guided West Indies to 153/6, a total Scotland almost chased down thanks to Darcey Carter's 59. Crucial late wickets from Aaliyah Alleyne and Hayley Matthews sealed the win.

articles.description: Las Vegas Raiders running back Ashton Jeanty has become a major talking point after a viral offseason workout photo showcased his noticeably bigger physique. NFL fans flooded social media with reactions, with some comparing him to Derrick Henry while others questioned the hype. The buzz arrives as new offensive coordinator Klint Kubiak prepares to build the Raiders' offence around Jeanty and Brock Bowers. With expectations rising ahead of training camp, the former Boise State star's dramatic transformation has only added to the excitement surrounding Las Vegas as it enters the 2026 NFL season.

After moving from the Soviet Union to Germany, they helped raise and train two professional tennis players, Mischa and Alexander. Their influence remains a major part of Alexander’s success story.

articles.title: More than just referees: Penso, Nesbitt and Mayo take center stage to make World Cup history
articles.description: In a groundbreaking moment for sports, the 2026 FIFA World Cup witnessed history as Tori Penso led an all-American female officiating crew during a men's match. Together with Kathryn Nesbitt and Brooke Mayo, they became the second all-female team and the first American trio to step onto such a prestigious stage, a significant stride towards promoting gender equality in football.

articles.description: Scottie Scheffler and his wife, Meredith Scudder, are parents to two sons, Bennett and Remy. Bennett was born in May 2024 and has already shared several special moments from his father’s golf career. Remy arrived in March 2026 and visited Augusta National just nine days later. Despite his success in golf, Scheffler says being a great father matters most to him.

Ghana secured a dramatic late win against Panama, while Colombia triumphed 3-1 against debutants Uzbekistan. Czechia and South Africa played out a hard-fought 1-1 draw, with England, Ghana, and Colombia emerging as the day's biggest winners.
